title: Welcome
snippet: WelcomeHello and welcome to my script docs site.Adding a new network drive with New-PSDriveRequired parameters to create a network connection:Parameter	DescriptionName	Must be an available drive letterPSProvider	Set to FileSystem for network shares and foldersRoot	The network location that you want to mapPersist	To make it available outside PowerShell (in Explorer)New-PSDrive -Name V -PSProvider FileSystem -Root \\VM-server\Folder-01 -Persist
